creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Emil,

As a starting point, do you know the Porter's Handbook [1]? There you will find many many interesting things about FreeBSD's ports and how to do make ports even better ;)

[1] https://docs.freebsd.org/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.html

If you're still interested in taking over the port after poking around in the handbook, I'd be happy to put you down as a maintainer :)
